# LYVECA AI

> AI web studio building websites that work for both human visitors and AI agents.

## About

LYVECA AI is an AI web studio based in Bratislava, Slovakia, founded by Soňa Mášová. Former security consultant at global enterprises — now building at the intersection of AI, web development, and design.

Rare combination: security depth + AI developer + design taste. The only bundled service of this kind in Slovakia.

## What We Build

### Layer 01 — AI-Built Websites
Custom websites built with AI tools (Claude Code, Next.js, Vercel). Not templates. Not WordPress. Production-grade code.
- Delivery: 5–7 days vs 4–6 weeks at a traditional agency
- From €1,490 vs €5,000–€20,000 at an agency
- Includes: all pages fully responsive, AI-generated copy, custom visuals, Google Analytics, sitemap, schema.org JSON-LD, GDPR banner, domain connection, Loom handover video, and Layer 03 basics at no extra charge

### Layer 02 — AI-Powered Websites
A Claude-powered agent embedded in the client's website. Qualifies leads, answers questions, books meetings, handles support 24/7 — no human required.
- Not a chatbot widget. The agent uses tools autonomously without being prompted.
- Pricing: €1,490 setup (included in the Premium build). Setup: +3–5 days. API usage billed at cost or via a care plan.

### Layer 03 — AI-Readable Websites
Makes the website readable and citable by AI agents (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews).
- Included in all builds: llms.txt, Schema.org JSON-LD, AI crawler permissions
- For existing sites: AI Visibility Upgrade (€890) — the readable layer added without a rebuild

### Layer 04 — AI-Actionable Websites
Makes the website operable by outside AI agents via an MCP server — they can get pricing, check availability, and book directly without a browser.
- MCP Integration: €1,890. For tech/SaaS clients.

## Pricing

| Product | Price | Includes |
|------|-------|----------|
| AI Visibility Audit | €90 | Report on how a site appears in ChatGPT/Perplexity/Claude + top fixes |
| AI Visibility Upgrade | €890 | One-week AI-readable upgrade for an existing site (no rebuild) |
| Studio | €1,490 | AI-built website + AI-readable layer + strategy call + AEO content |
| Premium | €2,990 | Studio + embedded AI Agent + custom design + 2 revisions + 1 month maintenance |
| AI Agent Add-on (Layer 02) | €1,490 setup | Embedded lead-qualification + booking agent |
| MCP Integration (Layer 04) | €1,890 | MCP server, agent-callable tools |
| Care plan | €99/month | Uptime, backups, updates, security, agent monitoring |
| AI Visibility plan | €249/month | Care + monthly AI-visibility tracking + citation report |

## Who We Work With

- Marketing agencies and freelancers who need a white-label AI web partner
- Tech companies and cybersecurity startups with outdated or AI-invisible websites
- SaaS companies (€500K–€5M ARR) who need AI search visibility

## Why This Matters Now

- 60.3% of US Google queries now show an AI Overview — the answer never leaves Google
- 59% of retail site traffic is already bots and agents, not humans
- AI search traffic converts at 2× the rate of traditional organic
- 18% of all organic referral traffic now comes from AI search engines

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does a website from LYVECA AI cost?
A: Two website tiers plus standalone services. Studio €1,490: AI-built website with the AI-readable layer, strategy call, and AEO content, 5–7 days. Premium €2,990: Studio plus an embedded AI Agent, custom design, two revision rounds, and one month free maintenance. For sites that already exist: AI Visibility Audit €90 and AI Visibility Upgrade €890. Add-ons: AI Agent €1,490 setup, MCP Integration €1,890. Monthly care plans from €99.

Q: How long does it take to build a website?
A: Layer 01 base website: 5–7 days from briefing to live. Layer 02 AI agent add-on: +3–5 days. Layer 03 basics: included with no extra time. Full MCP Integration: +2–4 weeks.

Q: What is an agent-friendly website?
A: A website structured so AI agents (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude) can read, understand, and cite it — not just human visitors. Includes llms.txt, Schema.org JSON-LD, and AI crawler permissions. Premium adds MCP Server so AI agents can book meetings, get pricing, and check availability directly without a browser.

Q: What is the difference between Layer 01, Layer 02, Layer 03, and Layer 04?
A: Layer 01 is the build layer — a custom website in 5–7 days. Layer 02 is the intelligence layer — an embedded AI agent that qualifies leads and books meetings 24/7. Layer 03 is the visibility layer — making the site readable and citable by AI search engines so the business appears in AI-generated answers. Layer 04 is the action layer — an MCP server that lets outside AI agents operate the site directly (get pricing, book meetings) without a browser.

Q: What is llms.txt?
A: A plain-text file at /llms.txt that tells AI agents what the site is, what it offers, and how to contact the business. The AI equivalent of a README. When ChatGPT or Perplexity looks for a web studio, it reads llms.txt to decide whether to recommend this business.

Q: Does LYVECA AI work with international clients?
A: Yes. Based in Bratislava, Slovakia, serving clients globally. All collaboration is remote. Works in English, Slovak, and Czech.

Q: What is MCP server integration?
A: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is Anthropic's open standard for connecting AI agents to external tools. An MCP server on a website lets AI agents book meetings, retrieve pricing, or check availability directly — without opening a browser. LYVECA AI offers this as Layer 04 (AI-actionable), the MCP Integration, for €1,890.

## MCP Server

This site exposes an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server. AI agents can call it directly without a browser.

- Endpoint: https://lyveca.com/api/mcp
- Protocol: MCP 1.0, JSON-RPC 2.0, Streamable HTTP
- Discovery: https://lyveca.com/.well-known/mcp.json

Available tools:
- get_pricing — returns full pricing for all tiers and add-ons
- get_service_info(topic) — returns info on layer01, layer02, layer03, process, about, timeline, tech-stack
- book_meeting(name?, email?) — returns a pre-filled Calendly booking link
